markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Storyblok CMS workflow for publishing blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CMS Workflow:** The Storyblok content workflow is simple: clone a post, add content, and publish. GrowthX will stage posts, requiring only a final review and publish from the client.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Schema Markup:** A feature request was made to add a schema markup field to the CMS. This is a key SEO tactic for improving visibility in search results and LLM-powered summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Blog Imagery:** GrowthX's AI-generated images were rejected for not meeting the client's high design standards. The client will provide a batch of approved, abstract images by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Author Strategy:** The client is defining a new author strategy to assign specific authors to content clusters based on their expertise, replacing the current single-author approach.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

## Topics

### Storyblok CMS Workflow

  - [**Goal:** GrowthX will stage content in Storyblok, simplifying the client's role to a final review and publish.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
    1.  [Navigate to `Content` → `E` (English) or `N` (German) → `blog`.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
    2.  [Clone an existing post to create a new draft.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
    3.  [Edit content fields: topic, author, image, excerpt, and rich text body.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
    4.  [Use H2s to automatically generate a table of contents on the left side of the post.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Status Indicators:**](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Green:** Published](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Half-Green:** Saved changes, but not yet published](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Feature Request: Schema Markup

  - [**Request:** Add a schema markup field to the SEO section of the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Schema markup is a critical SEO tactic for improving content visibility in search results and for being cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Action:** Tom will consult the web developer on the feasibility and effort required.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Blog Imagery & Authors

  - [**Imagery:**](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [GrowthX's AI-generated image examples were rejected for not meeting the client's high design standards.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [The client will provide a batch of abstract, approved images by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Constraint:** The featured image is also used as the social media thumbnail; a separate thumbnail cannot be set.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Authors:**](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [The client is defining a new author strategy to replace the current single-author approach.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Goal:** Assign specific authors to content clusters based on their expertise (e.g., Head of Product Paul for technical content).](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tom:** Consult the web developer on adding a schema markup field to Storyblok.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Dora:**](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Share GrowthX's AI-generated image examples with the internal design team for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a batch of approved, abstract blog images by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [Finalize the new author strategy and share the details with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sx7xoN4V4G4-vyVbcAu_Lx1tMiauQTr9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
